subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been sent down by the Self-Subsisting unto him who hath cast away vain imaginings, turning unto God, the Lord of what was and what shall be. Blessed is he who hath quaffed the wine of certitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله القیوم لمن نبذ الموهوم مقبلا الی الله رب ما کان و ما یکون طوبی لمن شرب رحیق الایقان
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @knowledge; recognition of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
